Which organelle is primarily responsible for ATP synthesis in eukaryotic cells?
Mitochondria
Nucleus
Ribosome
Golgi apparatus
Mitochondria are the site of oxidative phosphorylation and the electron transport chain, which produce the majority of cellular ATP through aerobic respiration.
In meiosis, when does crossing over (recombination) occur?
Prophase I
Metaphase II
Anaphase I
Telophase II
Crossing over occurs during Prophase I when homologous chromosomes synapse and exchange genetic material at chiasmata.
